zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor Bell Corprew於1702年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州時，她的父親John Corprew32歲，母親Mary Lockhart32歲。她於1725年與Benjamin William Peyton在美國北卡羅來納州結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1753年在美國北卡羅來納州博福特享年51歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加北卡羅來納州博福特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor Bell Corprew于1702年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州时，她的父亲John Corprew32岁，母亲Mary Lockhart32岁。她于1725年与Benjamin William Peyton在美国北卡罗来纳州结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1753年在美国北卡罗来纳州博福特享年51岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加北卡罗来纳州博福特。

nameMeanings.name: Corprew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Perhaps an Anglicized form of Walloon Carpreau, a nickname from Old French carprel, carpreau, a diminutive form of Old Picard carpre ‘carp’, perhaps for a fish merchant. Compare Karper .

History: Evidence of family historian Susan Thompson suggests that John Corperhew or Corperew, who is documented in 1681 and 1700 (in his will) as a resident in Norfolk County, VA, might be descended from the family of David Corporew, who was a merchant of the French church in 1582-3 in Billingsgate (the chief ward of the fishmongers in London). He may be identical with David Carpreau, named (with John Carpreau) in 1586 as one of a number of "Low Countrymen in London". Children of David and Ester Carpreau were baptized in 1604 and 1609 at the French Huguenot Church in Threadneedle Street, London. A London record of 1618 listing Protestant exiles from France names “David Carpreau, merchant, aged about 60, born at Tournai” (in Wallonia).

variants.name: Karper
meanings: German and Jewish (from Poland and Germany): derivative of   Karp  . Compare   Carper  .

Dutch: metonymic occupational name from Middle Dutch carpere ‘carp’, for someone who catches or breeds carp in a hatchery, or a nickname for someone as lively as a carp can be, or a topographic or habitational name referring to a house distinguished by the sign of a carp.

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

nameMeanings.name: Bell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, originally a local name for someone who lived in a dell or hollow.

historicEvents.title: The Tuscarora War
historicEvents.description: The British, Dutch, and German settlers fought with the Tuscarora Native Americans, from September 22, 1711- February 11, 1715, in North Carolina.
North Carolina is the location of Cape Hatteras, sometimes called the Graveyard of the Atlantic- many shipwrecks have occurred nearby.

historicEvents.title: Becomes a Royal Colony
historicEvents.description: July 25, 1729, North Carolina became a royal colony, when the colony was sold to King George II.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Anchor-Carolina Becomes North and South Carolina

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor Bell Corprew was born in 1702, in Virginia, British Colonial America, her father, John Corprew, was 32 and her mother, Mary Lockhart, was 32. She married Benjamin William Peyton in 1725, in North Carolina, United States. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 7 daughters. She died in 1753, in Beaufort, North Carolina, United States, at the age of 51, and was buried in Beaufort, North Carolina, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor Bell Corprew est née en 1702, à Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, John Corprew, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Mary Lockhart, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Benjamin William Peyton en 1725, à Caroline du Nord, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée en 1753, à Beaufort, Caroline du Nord, États-Unis, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterrée à Beaufort, Caroline du Nord, Amérique coloniale britannique.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor Bell Corprewが1702年にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州で生まれた時，父John Corprewは32歳，母Mary Lockhartは32歳であった。1725年にアメリカ合衆国ノースカロライナ州でBenjamin William Peytonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1753年にアメリカ合衆国ノースカロライナ州ビーウフォートで51歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカノースカロライナ州ビーウフォートにて埋葬された。

ko.Beaufort, North Carolina, British Coloni: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 노스캐롤라이나 주 보포트
ko.Beaufort, Carteret, North Carolina, Unit: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 노스캐롤라이나 주 카테렛 보포트
ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor Bell Corprew(이)가 1702년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Corprew(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Lockhart(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1725년 미국 노스캐롤라이나 주에서 Benjamin William Peyton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1753년 미국 노스캐롤라이나 주 보포트에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 노스캐롤라이나 주 보포트에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Benjamin William Peyton em 1725, em Carolina do Norte, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 7 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor Bell Corprew родилась в 1702 г. в местности Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени John Corprew было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Mary Lockhart, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Benjamin William Peyton в 1725 г. в местности Северная Каролина, Соединенные штаты. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 7 дочерей. Она умерла в 1753 г. в местности бофорт, Северная Каролина, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 51 год и была похоронена в местности бофорт, Северная Каролина, бритиш колоняль амирика.
